steps.t: Iwan is sitting on the shore of the lake near the orchard of Tûr Morva. You have collected residue from the toads of Tâl Methedras and should bring it…
Maelona is outside her house near the entrance of Tûr Morva. Iwan has inadvisably tasted the toad-residue that he wants to coat the Falcon-clan's weap…
Iwan is at the lake's edge near the orchards of Tûr Morva. Maelona has given you some powder that should cure Iwan of his digestive complaint.
